title: Veer DFG compile error
body:
In verilator_ext_tests, running `t/t_cores_veer_eh1_cmark.py --vlt` fails with below compile error. adding `-fno-dfg` makes it pass.  I didn't bisect but it was passing on Sunday.

Likewise t_cores_swerv_cmark, but certainly same issue.

Attn @gezalore 

```
Vtb_top___024root__DepSet_h9ad02603__4.cpp: In function âvoid Vtb_top___024root___nba_comb__TOP__0(Vtb_top___024root*)â:
Vtb_top___024root__DepSet_h9ad02603__4.cpp:6612:62: error: array subscript 5 is outside array bounds of âVlWide<5> [1]â [-Werror=array-bounds=]
 6606 |                             ? 0U : (__Vtemp_4[((IData)(3U)
      |                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
 6607 |                                                + (7U
      |                                                ~~~~~          
 6608 |                                                   & (((IData)(0x4eU)
      |                                                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 6609 |                                                       *
      |                                                       ~       
 6610 |                                                       (1U
      |                                                       ~~~     
 6611 |                                                        & (IData)(vlSelfRef.tb_top__DOT__rvtop__DOT__mem__DOT__iccm__DOT____Vcellout__genblk2__DOT__rd_addr_ff__dout)))
      |                                                        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 6612 |                                                      >> 5U)))]
      |                                                      ~~~~~~~~^
Vtb_top___024root__DepSet_h9ad02603__4.cpp:6504:24: note: at offset 20 into object â__Vtemp_4â of size 20
 6504 |     VlWide<5>/*159:0*/ __Vtemp_4;
      |                        ^~~~~~~~~
```
